title: The Professional Wanderer
content:
آ آ آ آ When youï؟½ve knocked about the country, been away from home for years;
آ آ آ آ When the past, by distance softened, nearly fills your eyes with tears, 
آ آ آ آ You are haunted oft, wherever or however you may roam,
آ آ آ آ By a fancy that you ought to go and see the folks at home.
آ آ آ آ You forget the family quarrels, little things that used to jar, 
آ آ آ آ And you think of how theyï؟½ll worry, how they wonder where you are;
آ آ آ آ You will think you served them badly, and your own part youï؟½ll condemn,
آ آ آ آ And it strikes you that youï؟½ll surely be a novelty to them,
آ آ آ آ For your voice has somewhat altered, and your face has somewhat changed, 
آ آ آ آ And your views of men and matters over wider fields have ranged.
آ آ آ آ Then itï؟½s time to save your money, or to watch it (how it goes!);
آ آ آ آ Then itï؟½s time to get a ï؟½Gladstoneï؟½ and a decent suit of clothes;
آ آ آ آ Then itï؟½s time to practise daily with a hair-brush and a comb,
آ آ آ آ Till you drop in unexpected on the folks and friends at home.
آ آ آ آ When youï؟½ve been at home for some time, and the noveltyï؟½s worn off,
آ آ آ آ And old chums no longer court you, and your friends begin to scoff;
آ آ آ آ When ï؟½the girlsï؟½ no longer kiss you, crying ï؟½Jack! how you have changed!ï؟½
آ آ آ آ When youï؟½re stale to your relations, and their manner seems estranged ;
آ آ آ آ When the old domestic quarrels, round the table thrice a day,
آ آ آ آ Make it too much like the old times, make you wish youï؟½d stayed away,
آ آ آ آ When, in short, youï؟½ve spent your money in the fulness of your heart,
آ آ آ آ And your clothes are getting shabby . . . Then itï؟½s high time to depart.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Henry Lawson represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance, inviting the reader to reflect on the deeper themes of human experience and artistic expression.

In the broader context of Henry Lawson's bibliography, these specific lines stand out for their clarity and poignancy. Whether you are searching for inspiration or a moment of quiet contemplation, this work offers a timeless perspective that transcends its original era.

At Linespedia, we have curated this specific poem to ensure it reaches a modern audience. We recommend sharing these lines as a digital poster or using them as a thoughtful caption to connect with others who appreciate the enduring beauty of verse.
